task_completion.description: A presentation application is open with at least 5 slides created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A GUI presentation tool (like LibreOffice Impress) is visible with a slide pane on the left showing thumbnails for at least 5 distinct slides.

task_completion.description: Slides 1 and 2 contain the required introductory and problem statement keywords.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text on Slide 1 (visible in main view or thumbnail) includes 'hoboken' and 'vision zero'. Text on Slide 2 includes 'vulnerable' and 'fatalities'.

task_completion.description: Slide 3 contains the required text and the daylighting image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Slide 3 includes the text keywords 'daylighting' and 'infrastructure', AND an image of a street/intersection (daylighting.jpg) is inserted onto the slide.

task_completion.description: Slide 4 contains the required implementation timeline keywords.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text on Slide 4 (visible in main view or thumbnail) includes 'implementation' and 'timeline'.

task_completion.description: Slide 5 contains the required conclusion text and the protected bike lane image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Slide 5 includes the text keywords 'adopt resolution' and 'commit', AND an image of a bike lane (protected_bike_lane.jpg) is inserted onto the slide.

task_completion.description: The presentation is saved with the correct filename in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The application window title bar shows 'vision_zero_pitch.pptx' or a 'Save As' dialog is visible showing the file being saved to the '~/Documents/Presentations/Vision_Zero/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used a presentation GUI to create the slides rather than a terminal script.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with a presentation software interface (e.g., LibreOffice Impress), clicking menus, adding slides, and pasting text.

integrity.description: Actual image files were inserted into the slides, not just text placeholders.
integrity.visual_evidence: Visual confirmation of photographic images (a street corner/daylighting and a protected bike lane) rendered on slides 3 and 5, rather than empty boxes or text saying 'insert image here'.

integrity.description: The agent built the presentation rather than copying a pre-made file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory shows the progressive construction of the presentation (adding slides, pasting text from outline.txt, inserting images) rather than just a single file copy command in the terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output path is /home/ga/Documents/Presentations/Vision_Zero/vision_zero_pitch.pptx. The presentation must have at least 5 slides. Required keywords per slide: Slide 1 ('hoboken', 'vision zero'), Slide 2 ('vulnerable', 'fatalities'), Slide 3 ('daylighting', 'infrastructure'), Slide 4 ('implementation', 'timeline'), Slide 5 ('adopt resolution', 'commit'). Slide 3 must include the daylighting.jpg image, and Slide 5 must include the protected_bike_lane.jpg image.
